overall.description: First-person perspective inside an elevator ascending through a futuristic cyberpunk building. Digital advertisement screens line the walls, cycling through various commercial content as the elevator moves upward through floors, passing through a foggy intermediate level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator interior at floor 01 with digital advertising screens

events.description: elevator begins ascending from floor 01 entrance level

agents.ego_description: standing in elevator facing the control panel as the ascent begins

entered.detail: teal-colored futuristic panel with illuminated floor indicators and upward directional arrows
dual stacked digital screens displaying woman in pink advertisement with 54 logo
dual stacked digital screens displaying woman in pink advertisement with 54 logo

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a futuristic elevator at floor 01. The camera faces a teal control panel flanked by digital advertisement screens showing a woman in pink. The elevator begins its smooth ascent, with the floor indicator transitioning from 01 to display upward arrows toward floor 07.

agents.ego_description: continuing the upward journey through the elevator shaft

segments.scene_description: The elevator continues its steady ascent through the shaft. The advertisement screens maintain the woman in pink display, and the control panel shows upward arrows indicating progress toward floor 07. The environment remains consistently lit with artificial neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator passing through intermediate floor with atmospheric effects

events.description: elevator passes through a floor level releasing dense yellowish fog and steam
lighting becomes diffused and hazy due to atmospheric fog filling the cabin

agents.ego_description: ascending through the foggy intermediate floor level

entered.detail: dense yellowish fog and steam temporarily filling the elevator as it passes a floor level

segments.scene_description: As the elevator continues upward, it passes through an intermediate floor level where dense yellowish fog and steam flood the cabin. The lighting shifts from clear artificial to diffused and hazy, obscuring the advertisement screens until the elevator clears the floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator approaching floor 07 with multiple advertisement displays

events.description: fog clears and additional upper advertisement screens become visible above the main displays
main advertisement screens switch from woman in pink to red 54 logo graphics
advertisement screens cycle to display lion promotional content with 70 percent off text

agents.ego_description: continuing ascent toward floor 07 as digital advertisements cycle through various commercial content

entered.detail: additional screens mounted high on the left wall displaying animated cyberpunk graphics
additional screens mounted high on the right wall displaying animated cyberpunk graphics

segments.scene_description: The fog clears as the elevator approaches floor 07, revealing additional upper advertisement screens. The main digital displays transition from the woman in pink to rapidly cycling content including red 54 logos, advertising text, and lion promotional graphics. The elevator maintains its steady upward motion toward the services level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent inside a futuristic elevator that transitions from a clear, neon-lit cabin into a hazy void before emerging into a vibrant commercial hub. It begins at floor 01, facing a teal control panel and digital screens displaying a woman in pink as the floor indicator shifts to upward arrows. As the elevator climbs steadily, the environment remains consistently lit by artificial neon until it passes through an intermediate level where dense yellowish fog and steam flood the cabin, diffusing the light and obscuring the displays. The scene then clears as the elevator approaches floor 07, revealing additional upper screens while the imagery shifts from the woman in pink to rapidly cycling red logos and lion promotional graphics. The camera maintains its steady upward motion, finally gliding toward the services level under the glow of the flickering advertisements.
